name: Concentration
description: Concentration tracks concentration markers, reminders, and saving throws for Roll20 characters. It supports manual toggling, HP-loss concentration prompts, optional auto-roll saves, legacy 5e OGL-style spell cards, and D&D 2024 / Beacon spell-card detection. Beacon compatibility may require the Experimental API server, and Debug Mode can help diagnose detection issues.

useroptions.name: Command
useroptions.description: Primary chat command keyword used by the script (without the ! prefix).

useroptions.name: Status Marker
useroptions.description: Status marker used to represent concentration on tokens.

useroptions.name: HP Bar
useroptions.description: Token bar number to monitor for HP loss and concentration checks (1-3).

useroptions.name: Send Reminder To
useroptions.description: Reminder destination. Accepted values: everyone, character, gm.

useroptions.name: Bonus Attribute
useroptions.description: Character attribute used as concentration save modifier.

useroptions.name: Debug Mode
useroptions.description: Enable debug logging. Accepted values: true, false.

useroptions.name: Support Mode
useroptions.description: Debug verbosity mode. Accepted values: basic, detailed.
